emails.subject: APEA
emails.body: APEA Did you have your questions answered? I have a voice mail from Philip Levy and need to respond. Please give me a call after Thanksgiving. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: APEA
emails.body: APEA Did you have your questions answered? I have a voice mail from Philip Levy and need to respond. Please give me a call after Thanksgiving. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: Re: APEA
emails.body: He is a lawyer for APEA. Can I call him and let him know that the confirm was sent to APEA? When was it sent? Sara Diane Anderson@ENRON 11/27/2000 08:16 AM

emails.subject: Re: APEA
emails.body: Re: APEA I'm not sure who Philip Levy is, but yes, I did have my questions answered. Bob Bruce was able to help me set up the notification for Chase, and before I even sent it, I had confirmed the changes verbally with Chase. Thanks, Diane From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 11/22/2000 05:29 PM

emails.subject: Re: APEA
emails.body: I was only handling the confirmation of the financial swap portion of the deal. (Chase sells to ENA) Laird Dyer told me that he coordinated with Randy Gay to handle the physical portion. Chase ---ENA---APEA---Glendale fin phy phy ...........so I don't know what happened on the physical side. Sorry. Diane From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 11/27/2000 08:14 AM
